title: Holy Week
desc: Walk the last days with Christ, hour by hour, as Ludolph ordered them on the canonical hours — from the upper room to the empty tomb.

title: For the Anxious Heart
desc: For panic, dread, and the nights you cannot quiet. Christ in the storm, Christ lifting Peter, Christ sorrowful in the garden — and teaching you to pray.

title: For Grief
desc: For mourning. The widow's only son, the friend in the tomb, the burial of the Lord — and the first morning of resurrection.

title: When You Feel Nothing
desc: Ludolph's own counsel: when the heart is cold and will not weep, stay anyway, look anyway. The retreat no wellness app would dare to offer.

title: The Way of Humility
desc: From the angel's word to the washing of feet to silence before Pilate — the descent of God, that you might learn to go down with Him.

title: Facing Temptation
desc: Christ fasting and tempted, Christ sorrowful unto death, Peter who fell — that you might learn to stand.

title: When God Drew Near
desc: The angel, the manger, the Magi, the wine at Cana, the boy in the Temple — stand still before the strangeness of God made small.

title: He Is Risen
desc: From the empty tomb to the fire of Pentecost — the Lord appears to His Mother, to Magdalene, on the road, to Thomas.

title: The Wounds of Love
desc: Why did He suffer? For love. The cross, the dying Christ, the wine of joy, the love of Magdalene, the fire of the Spirit.

title: Rest & Trust
desc: The Our Father, the stilled sea, the blessed poor, the body laid to rest — learning to hand everything over.

title: Courage for the Fearful
desc: The desert won, Peter raised from the waves, Christ silent before power, the burial, and the Spirit who makes cowards into witnesses.

title: Longing for God
desc: Magdalene weeping at the tomb, the burning hearts on the road, the angel's annunciation, the prayer He taught — for those who ache for Him.
